goal: Replace bootstrap.ts with a proper `tap run <feature>` CLI command and embed a real-time terminal dashboard showing task progress, costs, and decorated terminal states.
description: Build a `tap run <feature>` CLI using @effect/cli and an embedded terminal dashboard driven by in-memory Ref<DashboardState>. Dashboard shows grouped stories/tasks with status glyphs, token costs, durations, and color-coded end states. Auto-detects TTY for graceful fallback.
constraints: Use @effect/cli for command definition and argument parsing
Raw ANSI escape codes + Bun built-in string utilities for rendering — no external TUI libraries
Dashboard state via Ref<DashboardState> — no file-tailing
JSONL logs still written to disk for post-mortem; dashboard does not read them
Non-TTY auto-fallback to plain scrolling log lines
Tasks grouped by story (Sx header), tasks show Tx only within groups
Decorated end states: green AllDone, red TaskExhausted, yellow RateLimited/MaxIterations/NoReadyTasks
Delete scripts/bootstrap.ts after CLI entry is operational
Follow existing Effect service patterns: Layer, Context.Tag, branded types, discriminated unions

stories.title: DashboardState type and LoopRunner integration
stories.description: Define the shared DashboardState type and modify LoopRunner to accept and update a Ref<DashboardState> at each state transition.

tasks.title: DashboardState ambient type
tasks.description: Create `src/types/Dashboard.d.ts` with ambient declarations for `DashboardState`, `DashboardStoryState`, `DashboardTaskState`, and `DashboardTotals`. Use `Option` for `phase` and `stoppedReason` fields. Follow existing ambient type conventions in `src/types/`.

tasks.title: LoopRunner Ref<DashboardState> integration
tasks.description: Modify `LoopRunner.run` signature to accept `Ref<DashboardState>`. Update `LoopRunnerLive` to call `Ref.update` at each transition: task start (status → in_progress, phase → Composer), phase change (→ Reviewer), cost/token accumulation from TaskResult, task completion (status → done|failed, phase → None), and terminal state (stoppedReason → Some). Update existing LoopRunner tests to provide the Ref.

stories.title: Dashboard renderer
stories.description: Build the pure render function and the Effect service that drives the terminal dashboard.

tasks.title: Pure renderFrame function and tests
tasks.description: Create `src/services/Dashboard/renderFrame.ts` with `renderFrame(state: DashboardState, columns: number) → string`. Implements grouped story/task layout with Set A glyphs (· › ✓ ✗), right-aligned cost ($X.XX) and duration per task, footer with total tokens and cost, decorated end-state footer with ANSI colors. Use `Bun.stringWidth()` and `Bun.sliceAnsi()` for column-aware layout. Tests in `src/services/Dashboard/__tests__/renderFrame.test.ts` cover: all-pending state, mixed statuses, decorated end states (AllDone green, TaskExhausted red, RateLimited yellow), narrow terminal truncation.

tasks.title: Dashboard Effect service
tasks.description: Create `src/services/Dashboard/Dashboard.ts` with Effect service exposing `run(ref: Ref<DashboardState>) → Effect<void>`. Implements: TTY detection via @effect/platform Terminal, refresh loop reading ref on ~200ms schedule and calling renderFrame, ANSI cursor-home + clear before each frame write, `q` keypress handling via Terminal.readInput to interrupt, plain-line fallback for non-TTY, terminal cleanup on exit (show cursor). Export via `src/services/Dashboard/index.ts`.

stories.title: CLI entry and cleanup
stories.description: Wire the @effect/cli command, connect all services, and remove the old bootstrap script.

tasks.title: CLI entry point with tap run command
tasks.description: Create `src/cli.ts` using @effect/cli: define `tap` command with `run` subcommand accepting a positional `feature` arg. Handler creates `Ref<DashboardState>` initialized from the loaded contract, forks LoopRunner.run and Dashboard.run as concurrent fibers, awaits loop completion then signals dashboard to render final frame and exit. Add `bin` field to `package.json` pointing to `src/cli.ts`. Wire all existing Effect layers (LoopRunnerLive, FeatureContractLive, RunTaskLive, ContextEngineLive, EvalParserLive, AgentRunnerLive, BunContext).

tasks.title: Delete bootstrap script
tasks.description: Delete `scripts/bootstrap.ts`. Verify no other scripts or docs reference it; update any that do.
